title: FUNNY 1 — Ginger sniffs mini-bed
prompt: Low-angle close-up in @dream-house. @Ginger pokes her head into a tiny pink mini-bed inside one floor of the Dream House — the bed is too small for her, she barely fits her snout in. Tail wagging. Off to the side, a small doll lies fallen on the floor where Ginger knocked it over. Ginger: "Woof?" Mischievous music sting.
